title: Cyclobalanus leptogyne

The health benefits of Cyclobalanus leptogyne include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyclobalanus leptogyne is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.

Cyclobalanus leptogyne is closely related to other species within the beech family, such as Cyclobalanus glauca and Cyclobalanus longipes. The classification of Cyclobalanus leptogyne places it within the plant kingdom, specifically within the division Magnoliophyta.
